pi_items.source: Synthetically generated in setup_task.sh with exactly 45 records meeting the Jaro-Winkler and Edit Distance fuzzy matching thresholds.
Task instructions and export_result.sh explicitly check for sequence MPI_SEQ starting at 1000000.
Explicitly defined and verified in export_result.sh.
Task instructions and export_result.sh grep commands explicitly require these exact Oracle features.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for oracle_sql_developer_env health_registry_record_linkage task by confirming that the patient records are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via a PL/SQL block in setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected 45 matching records deliberately include perturbed names and SSNs which correctly satisfy the requested Jaro-Winkler (>=85) and Edit Distance (<=2) thresholds, while the remaining 55 records strictly fail. Also confirmed the required sequence start (1000000), export path (/home/ga/Documents/exports/mpi_crosswalk.csv), and Oracle features match the export script. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
